purpose: Canonical hire-archetype roster for the banking CEO sim (1945-2040). Two levels: 8 base FAMILIES (faithful migration of the engine's CURRENT CharacterGenerator literals so wiring is a pure refactor) + ~36 division-flavored SPECIALIZATIONS. Drives CharacterGenerator (stat weights, integrity, salary), PathEngine::applyHireEffect (cultureShift), P5 archetype x macro -> P&L distribution (macroBetas + sigma), the credibility voice system (credibilityTendency, voiceFlavor), and the portrait layer (portraitDescriptor).

macro_axes.gdp: x = gdpGrowth - gbar  (real growth deviation). Positive beta = makes money when the economy expands.
macro_axes.rate: x = Delta fedFunds    (rate change). Positive beta = benefits from rising rates (asset-sensitive lenders); negative = hurt by hikes (duration/leverage carriers).
macro_axes.credit: x = -Delta creditSpread (tightening = positive). Positive beta = benefits from calm/tightening credit; negative = a spread-widening specialist (distress).
macro_axes.equity: x = sp500Return       (equity market return). Positive beta = long-the-tape risk-on; negative = bearish/hedged.
macro_axes.vix: x = -Delta vix         (falling vol = positive). Positive beta = wants calm markets; negative = a volatility harvester who profits from turbulence.

schema_notes.families: The 8 engine Archetype enum values. statWeights/integrityBase/salaryMult/eraSpawnWeights are migrated VERBATIM from CharacterGenerator.h (current P0 code) so swapping the literals for this file is behavior-preserving. macroBetas+sigma and cultureShift are NEW (P5/4.2) and live only here.
schema_notes.specializations: Division-flavored variants of a family. A specialization INHERITS its family's statWeights as a base and applies statWeightDeltas (added then renormalized at load). It overrides integrityBase, credibilityTendency, salaryRangeUSD, macroBetas, sigma, crowdingClass when present; otherwise inherits the family value.
schema_notes.salaryRangeUSD: Honest annual wage band the UI shows (EmployeeCandidate.annualSalary). In-economy cost = wage x SALARY_COST_SCALE (1e-4) at charge sites. calculateSalary() = (40000 + yearsExp*8000 + skillPremium) * salaryMult; the ranges here are the realized bands across levels/eras for that family/spec. COST CORRELATES WITH EXPECTED VALUE: high baseSalaryMult buys high |macroBeta| (more upside leverage) and usually high sigma. Hiring expensive people is the growth lever.
schema_notes.baseSalaryMult: Multiplier on the family salaryMult for this specialization (cost <-> expected-value knob).
schema_notes.macroBetas: Per-quarter sensitivity vector consumed by P5 eq: macroMult = 1 + Σ_k w_a · β_a,k · x_t,k. Aggressive types: high |beta| + high sigma. Conservative: low/low. Relationship types: LOW sigma but earn through sideBenefits, not beta.
schema_notes.sigma: Idiosyncratic quarterly vol. Lifer/Patrician ~0.05 (near-deterministic); Gunslinger ~0.35 (fat tails). Combined at desk level: sigma_div = sqrt(Σ w_a^2 sigma_a^2) · crowdingPenalty.
schema_notes.sideBenefits: Non-beta mechanical edges (the relationship-man requirement that they 'matter mechanically'). Keys: depositStickiness (slows deposit flight / lowers funding beta), dealflowQuality (raises mean & win-rate of arriving deals in affinity divisions), bookStability (lowers PD volatility on the loan book), feeAnnuity (smooths fee revenue), clientRetention. Values 0..1 are relative magnitudes for P6 wiring.
schema_notes.crowdingClass: Correlated-risk bucket for P6 crowdingPenalty. Hiring many of the same class raises desk sigma and decays per-head return. Classes: directional_macro, vol_harvest, carry_leverage, relationship_credit, fee_advisory, systematic_quant, originate_distribute, distress_countercyclical, frontier_tech, operations_control.
schema_notes.credibilityTendency: 0..1 prior for the per-NPC hidden credibility (P4.3). High = honest/terse/falsifiable pitches; low = crony/verbose/certain. NOT visible to the player; vibe-read through language.
schema_notes.cultureShift: Vector consumed by PathEngine::applyHireEffect keyed by the REAL family id (un-breaks NORTH_STAR 'hiring gunslingers shifts culture'). Axes: riskCulture, internationalFocus, techInvestment, politicalCapital, innovationBias.
schema_notes.divisionAffinity: DivisionType enum json names (Division.h) where this type spawns and performs best.
schema_notes.eraRange: {from,to} inclusive game-years the specialization can appear. Family eraSpawnWeights still gate base spawn; spec eraRange further restricts.

families.blurb: Old-money relationship banker. White-shoe trust and commercial lending; networks open doors, analytics are an afterthought.
families.voiceFlavor: Speaks in understatement and pedigree: 'We've banked the family since the war. The number is sound.'
families.portraitDescriptor: Silver-haired in a three-piece chalk-stripe, club tie, half-moon glasses; serene, a little bored.

families.blurb: Aggressive risk-taker. Trading and derivatives; monster booms, fat left tail in busts. Low integrity, high ambition.
families.voiceFlavor: Loud, certain, urgent: 'This is a layup. Size it up or get out of my way.'
families.portraitDescriptor: Sleeves rolled, tie loose, sweat at the collar, two phones; grinning like he already won.

families.blurb: PhD model-builder. Securitization and systematic trading; appears post-1980. Precision over instinct, adaptable.
families.voiceFlavor: Precise, hedged, falsifiable: 'Backtest says 1.4 Sharpe out of sample; it breaks if vol regimes shift.'
families.portraitDescriptor: Rumpled academic, lanyard, three monitors of Greek letters; talks to the screen, not you.

families.blurb: M&A and underwriting closer. Persuasion and networks; lives on fee cyclicality. Mid integrity, glory-driven.
families.voiceFlavor: Smooth, flattering, name-dropping: 'I had the chairman on the phone this morning. This gets done by Friday.'
families.portraitDescriptor: Sharp suit, pocket square, mid-handshake; the smile reaches the eyes only sometimes.

families.blurb: The machine-runner. Operations and management; leadership-heavy, steady, keeps the trains running. High integrity.
families.voiceFlavor: Plain, process-first: 'We can scale that to forty branches by Q3 if we fix settlement first.'
families.portraitDescriptor: Short sleeves, clipboard, ID badge; mid-sentence pointing at a flowchart.

families.blurb: Wealth and client-relations star. Brings the book with them; networks are the asset. Senior, expensive, steady.
families.voiceFlavor: Warm, personal, unhurried: 'The Hartfords trust me, not the bank. They'll move when I move.'
families.portraitDescriptor: Tanned, golf-tan watch line, blazer no tie, a Rolodex of a smile.

families.blurb: Young phenom, 0-2 years in. Cheap, raw, high ceiling/variance; analytical and adaptable. The lottery-ticket hire.
families.voiceFlavor: Eager, a little cocky, unpolished: 'I know it sounds crazy but the data is screaming it.'
families.portraitDescriptor: Too-big suit or a hoodie, energy-drink can, wide eyes; younger than everyone in the room.

families.blurb: Decades at the desk. Reliable, resilient, low ambition; near-deterministic, the floor of the bank. Highest integrity.
families.voiceFlavor: Dry, institutional memory: 'We tried this in '74. It didn't end the way you think.'
families.portraitDescriptor: Cardigan over a shirt, reading glasses on a chain, a coffee mug older than the intern; unbothered.

specializations.voiceFlavor: Golf-course dealflow: 'Made the loan on the back nine. Good family, they always pay.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: Blazer with a club crest, golf glove tucked in pocket, easy handshake.

specializations.voiceFlavor: Fiduciary calm: 'We preserve, we do not chase. The estate will outlive us both.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: Quiet office, leather chair, family photos that aren't his; speaks softly.

specializations.voiceFlavor: The 'no' man: 'Cash flow doesn't cover the debt service at a stress rate. We pass.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: Visor or rolled sleeves, red pen poised over a credit memo; permanent frown of skepticism.

specializations.voiceFlavor: Throughput first: 'Approvals are up 40% quarter on quarter. Worry about defaults next year.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: Headset on, stack of applications, a sales-board behind him; always closing.

specializations.voiceFlavor: Feel over model: 'I don't need a reason. The tape's heavy. I'm short.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: Cigarette, ticker tape in one hand, shirt half untucked; eyes locked on a board you can't see.

specializations.voiceFlavor: Swagger: 'I made the desk eight figures last year. Don't ask me to wear a leash.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: Suspenders, Hermes tie thrown over the shoulder, fist on the desk; a winner's sneer.

specializations.voiceFlavor: Hedged precision: 'Edge is small but it's stable. We win on turnover, not on any one trade.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: Fleece vest over a tee, mechanical keyboard, whiteboard of equations; never looks up.

specializations.voiceFlavor: Always has a thesis: 'The Fed's behind the curve. I'm betting the whole curve steepens.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: FT under the arm, gesturing at a world map, espresso going cold; certain about everything.

specializations.voiceFlavor: Sells calm, fears the storm: 'We collect premium every quiet quarter. The tail is the whole game.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: Calm half-smile, a single screen of a volatility surface; the eyes flick to the VIX constantly.

specializations.voiceFlavor: Brings the mandate: 'I own this CEO's number. Where I go, the fee follows.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: Bespoke suit, two phones, boarding pass in the breast pocket; perpetually about to fly somewhere.

specializations.voiceFlavor: Model is gospel: 'At a 9.2x exit the IRR clears the hurdle. Anything north of that is gravy.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: Pulled an all-nighter, three energy drinks, model open on a laptop; dead-eyed but exact.

specializations.voiceFlavor: Leverage is a feature: 'Cheap debt and a fat dividend recap. The equity is almost free.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: Pinstripe, slicked hair, cigar; an '80s predator photographed mid-toast.

specializations.voiceFlavor: Missionary zeal: 'High yield isn't risky, it's democratized capital. Everyone else just can't see it yet.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: Late nights at an X-shaped trading desk, rolled charts of yield curves; the true believer's glare.

specializations.voiceFlavor: Volume at any cost: 'Stated income, no doc, who cares? We sell it before it can default.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: Hawaiian shirt under a blazer, leased sports car keys on the desk, a sales gong behind him.

specializations.voiceFlavor: Belt and suspenders: 'The appraisal is stale and the title has a lien. This file doesn't close today.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: Glasses pushed up, stamp in hand, a wall of binders; finds the one missing signature every time.

specializations.voiceFlavor: Tranching as alchemy: 'Pool the risk, slice the waterfall, the senior tranche is AAA. Trust the correlation.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: Structuring diagrams taped to the glass, a waterfall chart glowing; quietly pleased with the cleverness.

specializations.voiceFlavor: Cosmopolitan ease: 'London books it offshore, no reserve requirement. The spread is beautiful.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: Savile Row suit, passport visible, a cigarette and a Concorde ticket; speaks three languages over lunch.

specializations.voiceFlavor: Maps and flags: 'A branch in Sao Paulo, a desk in Tokyo. We bank the whole hemisphere or none of it.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: In front of a wall map studded with pins, sleeves up, pointing at the next conquest.

specializations.voiceFlavor: Cassandra, often right too early: 'The whole thing is a house of cards. I've been short for two years.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: Hunched over a Bloomberg, charts all red, a haunted look; the only one not smiling at the party.

specializations.voiceFlavor: Feeds on the wreckage: 'Their bankruptcy is my entry point. I buy the debt at forty and own the company.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: Dark suit, calm in a crisis, reading a Chapter 11 docket like a menu.

specializations.voiceFlavor: Process over outcome: 'It's compliant. Whether it's a good idea is above my pay grade.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: Cubicle, checklist on a clipboard, a wall of regulatory binders; literally ticking boxes.

specializations.voiceFlavor: Lives in the FICO bands: 'Charge-offs tick up at 680 and below. Price it, don't avoid it.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: Headphones, a dashboard of delinquency curves, coffee; optimizes a risk-based APR all day.

specializations.voiceFlavor: Discreet and indispensable: 'I know what the family is worth and what they fear. That is the whole product.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: Impeccable, soft-spoken, a leather folio; the kind of person who is never photographed.

specializations.voiceFlavor: Sells the sizzle: 'Past performance, four stars, and the story sells itself. AUM is destiny.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: Pitchbook open to a hockey-stick chart, big watch, conference-stage tan.

specializations.voiceFlavor: Power-law gospel: 'Nine go to zero, one returns the fund. I only need to be right once, enormously.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: Patagonia vest, sneakers with a suit jacket, a deck on an iPad; nods knowingly at every pitch.

specializations.voiceFlavor: Speaks startup fluently: 'TAM is a trillion, burn is fine, they'll be default-alive by Series B.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: Hoodie, AirPods, laptop covered in stickers; the same age as the founders he funds.

specializations.voiceFlavor: AI-native confidence: 'The model already wrote the strategy. I just decide when to trust it.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: Dual monitors of chat windows, a mechanical keyboard, a 'this is fine' mug; very online.

specializations.voiceFlavor: Maximalist hype: 'Fiat is dying. We're not late, we're early. Have fun staying poor.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: Laser eyes in the avatar sense, hoodie with a token logo, three phones of green-and-red candles.

specializations.voiceFlavor: Metrics-driven: 'CAC is down, LTV is up, churn's under 2%. The unit economics finally work.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: Standing desk, Slack notifications, a growth dashboard on the wall; runs the platform like a startup.

specializations.voiceFlavor: The institutional conscience: 'I've watched three banks die doing exactly this. The answer is no.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: Decades-old name plate, an immaculate desk, a single framed regulation; the calm of someone who cannot be fired.

specializations.voiceFlavor: 3-6-3 banker: 'Borrow at three, lend at six, on the golf course by three. Steady as she goes.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: Behind a heavy oak desk in a marble lobby, a town pillar; everyone in the branch calls him sir.

specializations.voiceFlavor: Logistics discipline: 'I ran a supply depot in the Pacific. A bank branch is easy by comparison.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: Crew cut, service pin on the lapel, a no-nonsense posture; runs the floor like a unit.

specializations.voiceFlavor: Black-box salesman: 'The client doesn't need to understand the payoff. They need to like the coupon.'
specializations.portraitDescriptor: Term sheets fanned out, a payoff diagram on the screen, an unreadable smile; the model is the moat.
